_comment: Golden-synthetic NormalizedTranscriptionResult for phrase_alpha.wav simulating a Parakeet adapter run (native word-level timings, authoritative=true). Generated deterministically from the oracle with +/- 5-12 ms per-boundary jitter to emulate realistic native-timing noise while staying well within the parity gates (median <= 20 ms, p95 <= 40 ms). Regenerate from a real adapter run when the eval-harness-runner agent can drive the app headlessly against these fixtures.
